description: MCP server for interacting with a Jira DataCenter instance

jira_url.title: Jira Base URL
jira_url.description: The base URL of your Jira DataCenter instance (e.g. https://jira.example.com/rest)

jira_token.title: Jira Personal Access Token
jira_token.description: Your Jira personal access token for authentication

tools.name: jira_get_current_user
tools.description: Get current Jira user information. Pass structured=true to get a JSON object with name, display_name, and email.

tools.name: jira_search_issue
tools.description: Search for Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Returns key details like summary, status, assignee, and priority for matching issues

tools.name: jira_get_issue
tools.description: Get a Jira issue by ID or key, including all fields and comments

tools.name: jira_create_issue
tools.description: Create a new Jira issue in a project

tools.name: jira_update_issue
tools.description: Update fields of an existing Jira issue. Only the fields you provide will be changed. To transition the issue status, provide a 'status' value matching an available transition name.

tools.name: jira_add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue

tools.name: jira_get_transitions
tools.description: List available workflow transitions for a Jira issue. Use this to discover valid status values before calling jira_update_issue with a 'status' field.

tools.name: jira_get_worklogs
tools.description: Get all worklogs updated since a given Unix timestamp in milliseconds. Paginates automatically until all results are collected. Returns worklog details including author, time spent, and dates.

tools.name: jira_add_worklog
tools.description: Log work on a Jira issue. time_spent uses Jira duration format (e.g. '1h 30m'). started is an ISO 8601 datetime; defaults to now if omitted.

tools.name: jira_get_all_projects
tools.description: List all Jira projects accessible to the current user

tools.name: jira_get_all_project_types
tools.description: List all Jira project types available on this instance
